artifact.period: FY2026 proxy season · real public peers · illustrative snapshot
artifact.title: Acme Corp Executive Compensation Benchmarking

assumptions.name: Representative incumbent policy
assumptions.value: one non-former, non-interim incumbent per company and role

caveats.text: Peer figures are actual SCT-disclosed pay rather than target compensation opportunity
Foreign private issuers use a different disclosure basis and are excluded from the US SCT distribution
The subject company and its executive-pay inputs are synthetic
The widest shortfall is based on a peer set below the preferred ten-observation comfort threshold
Partial-year transition officers are excluded when their pay is not representative of a full-year incumbent

checks.details: Counts tie to rendered positions; suppressed roles remain below the peer floor and never receive a percentile
checks.name: Coverage and suppression integrity

checks.details: Every percentile, quartile, target band, status, gap, role, and element is finite and internally consistent
checks.name: Position integrity

checks.details: Every public observation has a valid SEC archive URL, disclosure basis, currency, extraction date, and component-total reconciliation
checks.name: Proxy source provenance

claims.statement: 6 of 20 positions are below the policy band.
Synthetic CEO SCT Total is $8.47M.
Synthetic CEO SCT Total is at percentile 42.9.
2 foreign private issuers are excluded from the US SCT distribution.
The comparable distribution contains 14 US SCT peers.
The dashboard contains 20 role-element positions.

sources.label: Benchmarking policy, exclusions, and target bands

transformations.description: Count comparable US SCT peers, positioned role-element observations, exclusions, and below-band calls
transformations.name: Benchmark coverage counts

transformations.description: Select one representative incumbent per peer and role, calculate SCT-basis element distributions, and position the synthetic subject
transformations.name: Executive-pay percentile positioning

transformations.description: Suppress a role when comparable peer disclosure falls below the policy floor
transformations.name: Thin-role suppression
